chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-384 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of M.A.No.1434/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 31.07.2025 M/s Syed Zafar Ali shah & Shakeel Ahmed G. Ansari, advocates a/w petitioner. Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, D.A.G a/w Sub-Inspector Abdul Salam of FIA. -.-.-.-.- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner places on record set of documents/notices u/s 160 Cr.P.C for appearance, under the cover of his statement dated 31.07.2025. Sub-Inspector Abdul Salam of FIA Sukkur present on behalf of I.O Nisar Ahmed Abbasi and submits that the latter has gone in official duty out of city; however, he submits that the FIR has been registered against the petitioner which is under investigation and the petitioner has got bail from the Court below. Since the investigation is under process and the petitioner has also been granted ad-interim pre arrest bail from the Court concerned, therefore, instant petition in view of above legal position is hereby disposed of. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
